name: @xpaysh/discovery
description: Pure-function generators for the real agent-readable discovery surface: /llms.txt (llmstxt.org), schema.org JSON-LD (Product, ItemList), robots.txt allowlist for real AI crawlers, /.well-known/agent-card.json (A2A 1.0), /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource (RFC 9728). Zero deps. Consumed by xpaysh/agentic-commerce-for-* plugins.
author: xpay✦ <hello@xpay.sh>
